verses.geez: ወደገሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ገቢረ ፡ እኩይ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወናኦድሰ ፡ ሞተ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel continued to do evil against the Lord; and Aod was dead.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel again did evil in the sight of the LORD, when Ehud was dead.

verses.geez:
ወአግብኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደ ፡ ኢያሚን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ዘነግሠ ፡ በአሶር ፡ ወመልአከ ፡ ሰራዊቱ ፡
                  ሲሳራ ፡ ወውእቱሰ ፡ ይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሲሮት ፡ ዘአሕዛብ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord sold the children of Israel into the hand of Jabin king of Chanaan, who ruled in Asor; and the chief of his host was Sisara, and he dwelt in Arisoth of the Gentiles.
translations.kjv: And the LORD sold them into the hand of Jabin king of Canaan, that reigned in Hazor; the captain of whose host was Sisera, which dwelt in Harosheth of the Gentiles.

verses.geez:
ወገዐሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመቦ ፡ ትስዐተ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ሰረገላተ ፡ ዘኀፂን ፡ ወውእቱ ፡
                  አሕመሞሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይሣቅዮሙ ፡ ዕሥራ ፡ (ወኀምስተ ፡) ዓመተ ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel cried to the Lord, because he had nine hundred chariots of iron; and he mightily oppressed Israel twenty years.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel cried unto the LORD: for he had nine hundred chariots of iron; and twenty years he mightily oppressed the children of Israel.

verses.geez: ወዴቦራ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ነቢይት ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለፊዶት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትኴንኖሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ በእማንቱ ፡ መዋዕል ።

translations.lxx: And Debbora, a prophetess, the wife of Lapidoth,—she judged Israel at that time.
translations.kjv: And Deborah, a prophetess, the wife of Lapidoth, she judged Israel at that time.

verses.geez:
ወዴቦራሰ ፡ ትነብር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፊኒቃ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ኢያማ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ቤቴል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡
                  ኀቤሃ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትኰነኑ ።

translations.lxx: And she sat under the palm-tree of Debbora between Rama and Bæthel in mount Ephraim; and the children of Israel went up to her for judgment.
translations.kjv: And she dwelt under the palm tree of Deborah between Ramah and Bethel in mount Ephraim: and the children of Israel came up to her for judgment.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወት ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ወጸውዐቶ ፡ ለባረቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቢኔሔም ፡ እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ [ዘ]ንፍታሌም ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ አኮ[ኑ]
                  ፡ ኪያከ ፡ ኦዘዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ትሑር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ታቦር ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡
                  ፻-፻ዕደወ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ንፍታሌም ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዛቡሎን ።

translations.lxx: And Debbora sent and called Barac the son of Abineem out of Cades Nephthali, and she said to him, Has not the Lord God of Israel commanded thee? and thou shalt depart to mount Thabor, and shalt take with thyself ten thousand men of the sons of Nephthali and of the sons of Zabulon.
translations.kjv: And she sent and called Barak the son of Abinoam out of Kedeshnaphtali, and said unto him, Hath not the LORD God of Israel commanded, saying, Go and draw toward mount Tabor, and take with thee ten thousand men of the children of Naphtali and of the children of Zebulun?

verses.geez:
ወእወስደከ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ቂሶን ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ መልአከ ፡ ሰራዊቱ ፡ ለኢያሚን ፡ ወሰረገላቲሁ ፡ ወብዝኁ ፡
                  ወኣገብኦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ።

translations.lxx: And I will bring to thee to the torrent of Kison Sisara the captain of the host of Jabin, and his chariots, and his multitude, and I will deliver them into thine hands.
translations.kjv: And I will draw unto thee to the river Kishon Sisera, the captain of Jabin’s army, with his chariots and his multitude; and I will deliver him into thine hand.

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ እመ ፡ ተሐውሪ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ አሐውር ፡ ወእመሰ ፡ ኢተሐውሪ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ኢየሐውር ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ኢያአምር ፡ ዕለተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ይፈቅድ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ይፈኑ ፡ መልአኮ ፡ ምስሌየ ።

translations.lxx: And Barac said to her, If thou wilt go with me, I will go; and if thou wilt not go, I will not go; for I know not the day on which the Lord prospers his messenger with me.
translations.kjv: And Barak said unto her, If thou wilt go with me, then I will go: but if thou wilt not go with me, then I will not go.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ አሐውር ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ አእምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘቀዲሙ ፡ ቃልከ ፡ በፍኖት ፡
                  እንተ ፡ አንተ ፡ ሖርከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ያገብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ወተንሥአት ፡ ዴቦራ ፡
                  ወሖረት ፡ ምስለ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ።

translations.lxx: And she said, I will surely go with thee; but know that thy honour shall not attend on the expedition on which thou goest, for the Lord shall sell Sisara into the hands of a woman: and Debbora arose, and went with Barac out of Cades.
translations.kjv: And she said, I will surely go with thee: notwithstanding the journey that thou takest shall not be for thine honour; for the LORD shall sell Sisera into the hand of a woman. And Deborah arose, and went with Barak to Kedesh.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዞሙ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ ለዛቡሎን ፡ ወለንፍታሌም ፡ በቃዴስ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ እልፍ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወዴቦራሂ ፡ ዐርገት ፡
                  ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Barac called Zabulon and Nephthali out of Cades, and there went up at his feet ten thousand men, and Debbora went up with him.
translations.kjv: And Barak called Zebulun and Naphtali to Kedesh; and he went up with ten thousand men at his feet: and Deborah went up with him.

verses.geez:
ወእለ ፡ ቀርቡ ፡ ለቄኔዝ ፡ ተፈልጡ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኢዮባብ ፡ ሐሙሁ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ትዕይንቱ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዕፅ
                  ፡ ለበይት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቅሩበ ፡ ቃዴስ ።

translations.lxx: And Chaber the Kenite had removed from Caina, from the sons of Jobab the father-in-law of Moses, and pitched his tent by the oak of the covetous ones, which is near Kedes.
translations.kjv: Now Heber the Kenite, which was of the children of Hobab the father in law of Moses, had severed himself from the Kenites, and pitched his tent unto the plain of Zaanaim, which is by Kedesh.

verses.geez: ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዐርገ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቢኔሔም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ታቦር ።

translations.lxx: And it was told Sisara that Barac the son of Abineem was gone up to mount Thabor.
translations.kjv: And they shewed Sisera that Barak the son of Abinoam was gone up to mount Tabor.

verses.geez:
ወአምጽአ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ፱፻ሰረገላተ ፡ ዘኀፂን ፡ ቦ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ አሕዛቢሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሪሶት
                  ፡ ዘአሕዛብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ቂሶን ።

translations.lxx: And Sisara summoned all his chariots, nine hundred chariots of iron and all the people with him, from Arisoth of the Gentiles to the brook of Kison.
translations.kjv: And Sisera gathered together all his chariots, even nine hundred chariots of iron, and all the people that were with him, from Harosheth of the Gentiles unto the river of Kishon.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎ ፡ ዴቦራ ፡ ለባረቅ ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ያገብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ የሐውር ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ወወረደ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ታቦር ፡ ወእልፍ ፡
                  ብእሲ ፡ ይተልዎ ።

translations.lxx: And Debbora said to Barac, Rise up, for this is the day on which the Lord has delivered Sisara into thy hand, for the Lord shall go forth before thee: and Barac went down from mount Thabor, and ten thousand men after him.
translations.kjv: And Deborah said unto Barak, Up; for this is the day in which the LORD hath delivered Sisera into thine hand: is not the LORD gone out before thee? So Barak went down from mount Tabor, and ten thousand men after him.

verses.geez:
ወአደንገፆ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንቱ ፡ አውደቆሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ባረቅ ፡
                  በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወወረደ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ፡ ወጐየ ፡ በእግሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord discomfited Sisara, and all his chariots, and all his army, with the edge of the sword before Barac: and Sisara descended from off his chariot, and fled on his feet.
translations.kjv: And the LORD discomfited Sisera, and all his chariots, and all his host, with the edge of the sword before Barak; so that Sisera lighted down off his chariot, and fled away on his feet.

verses.geez:
ወዴገነ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ ወተለወ ፡ ሰረገላቲሁ ፡ ወዴገነ ፡ ትዕይንቶ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሐቅለ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንተ
                  ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ በአፈ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወኢተርፈ ፡ ወኢአሐዱ ።

translations.lxx: And Barac pursued after the chariots and after the army, into Arisoth of the Gentiles; and the whole army of Sisara fell by the edge of the sword, there was not one left.
translations.kjv: But Barak pursued after the chariots, and after the host, unto Harosheth of the Gentiles: and all the host of Sisera fell upon the edge of the sword; and there was not a man left.

verses.geez:
ወሲሳራሰ ፡ ጐየ ፡ በእግሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንተ ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ካቤር ፡ ካልኡ ፡ ለቄኔው ፡ እስመ ፡ ሰላም ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ለኢየቢን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ [አሶር ፡] ወማእከለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ካቤር ፡ ቄንያዊ ።

translations.lxx: And Sisara fled on his feet to the tent of Jael the wife of Chaber the Kenite his friend: for there was peace between Jabin king of Asor and the house of Chaber the Kenite.
translations.kjv: Howbeit Sisera fled away on his feet to the tent of Jael the wife of Heber the Kenite: for there was peace between Jabin the king of Hazor and the house of Heber the Kenite.

verses.geez:
ወወፅአት ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ወተቀበለቶ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ገሐሥ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ገሐሥ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወኢትፍራህ ፡ ወግሕሠ ፡
                  ኀቤሃ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወከደነቶ ፡ ሠቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Jael went out to meet Sisara, and said to him, Turn aside, my lord, turn aside to me, fear not: and he turned aside to her into the tent; and she covered him with a mantle.
translations.kjv: And Jael went out to meet Sisera, and said unto him, Turn in, my lord, turn in to me; fear not. And when he had turned in unto her into the tent, she covered him with a mantle.

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ ሲሳራ ፡ አስትይኒ ፡ ንስቲተ ፡ ማየ ፡ እስመ ፡ ጸማእኩ ፡ ወፈትሐት ፡ ስእረ ፡ ሐሊብ ፡ ወአስተየቶ ፡
                  ወከደነቶ ፡ ገጾ ።

translations.lxx: And Sisara said to her, Give me, I pray thee, a little water to drink, for I am thirsty: and she opened a bottle of milk, and gave him to drink, and covered him.
translations.kjv: And he said unto her, Give me, I pray thee, a little water to drink; for I am thirsty. And she opened a bottle of milk, and gave him drink, and covered him.

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ ቁሚ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወእመቦ ፡ ዘመጽአ ፡ ኀቤኪ ፡ ወይቤለኪ ፡ ቦ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ብእሲ ፡
                  በሊ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ወከደነቶ ፡ ሠቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Sisara said to her, Stand now by the door of the tent, and it shall come to pass if any man come to thee, and ask of thee, and say, Is there any man here? then thou shalt say, There is not.
translations.kjv: Again he said unto her, Stand in the door of the tent, and it shall be, when any man doth come and enquire of thee, and say, Is there any man here? that thou shalt say, No.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአት ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ካቤር ፡ መትከለ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ወእብነ ፡ በካልእት ፡ እዴሃ ፡ ወቦአት ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡
                  ወጸቀወቶ ፡ ወተከለት ፡ ውእተ ፡ መትከለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መልታሕቱ ፡ ወጐድአቶ ፡ እስከ ፡ ፀመረቶ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወተራገፀ
                  ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እገሪሃ ፡ ወተሰጥሐ ፡ ወሞተ ።

translations.lxx: And Jael the wife of Chaber took a pin of the tent, and took a hammer in her hand, and went secretly to him, and fastened the pin in his temple, and it went through to the earth, and he fainted away, and darkness fell upon him and he died.
translations.kjv: Then Jael Heber’s wife took a nail of the tent, and took an hammer in her hand, and went softly unto him, and smote the nail into his temples, and fastened it into the ground: for he was fast asleep and weary. So he died.

verses.geez:
ወበጽሐ ፡ ባረቅ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይዴግኖ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ወወፅአት ፡ ኢያኤል ፡ ወተቀበለቶ ፡ ለባረቅ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ ነዐ ፡
                  ወኣርእየከ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ዘተኀሥሥ ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ኀቤሃ ፡ ወረከቦ ፡ ለሲሳራ ፡ ውዱቀ ፡ በድኖ ፡ ወመትከል ፡ ውስተ ፡ መልታሕቱ ።

translations.lxx: And, behold, Barac was pursuing Sisara: and Jael went out to meet him, and she said to him, Come, and I will shew thee the man whom thou seekest: and he went in to her; and, behold, Sisara was fallen dead, and the pin was in his temple.
translations.kjv: And, behold, as Barak pursued Sisera, Jael came out to meet him, and said unto him, Come, and I will shew thee the man whom thou seekest. And when he came into her tent, behold, Sisera lay dead, and the nail was in his temples.

verses.geez: ወአኅሰሮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢያቢን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ከናአን ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ በቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: So God routed Jabin king of Chanaan in that day before the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: So God subdued on that day Jabin the king of Canaan before the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወሖረት ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወሖረት ፡ ወጸንዐት ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኢያቢን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡
                  ከናአን ፡ እስከ ፡ አጥፍኦ ።

translations.lxx: And the hand of the children of Israel prevailed more and more against Jabin king of Chanaan, until they utterly destroyed Jabin king of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: And the hand of the children of Israel prospered, and prevailed against Jabin the king of Canaan, until they had destroyed Jabin king of Canaan.
